title: Vermilion v1.3.0 Pure Grouping Modes
content:
Vermilion has been updated to v1.3.0, introducing pure grouping distribution options for Name Prefix and Dates.

Key additions:

  • Pure Date & Name Prefix Grouping: Added two new distribution options: 'Group by Date' and 'Group by Name Prefix'. Unlike count-based modes, these modes reorganize files purely into folders matching their date or name prefix without dividing them into sub-folders based on size constraints.
  • Sub-option Selection: Conditionally renders date type/granularity selectors for Date Grouping, and character counts for Name Grouping, while hiding the conflicting 'Sort Methods' card.
  • Backend Planner Updates: Bypasses count-boundary splits when grouping is selected to keep all matching files in single folders.
